channel.title: Avogadro on Pulkit Joshi
channel.description: Recent content in Avogadro on Pulkit Joshi

item.title: Install Avogadro
item.description: Avogadro is an advanced molecule editor and visualizer designed for cross-platform use in computational chemistry, molecular modeling, bioinformatics, materials science, and related areas. It offers flexible high quality rendering and a powerful plugin architecture. More details about Avogadro can be found here. Since Ubuntu 20.04 LTS release, the version of Avogadro in its official repos (focal/jammy) has changed from v1.2 to v1.95. However, the seemingly newer version does not offer enough functionality in terms of tweaking bond parameters, UFF optimization, and general ease of use.
